requirements.label: Passport Biographic Page
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the immigration case plus org-defined PII retention period (spec 12); encrypted bucket, signed time-limited URLs only; all access to sensitive PII logged.
requirements.notes: Universal intake slot for every noncitizen category (spec 7.3 lists passport for H-1B intake). Passport expiry is a tracked notification date (Appendix B). Must be unexpired at filing.

requirements.label: I-94 Arrival/Departure Record
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the immigration case plus org-defined PII retention period (spec 12); encrypted bucket, signed time-limited URLs only; all access logged.
requirements.notes: Spec 7.3 H-1B intake item. I-94 expiry is a primary notification trigger (Appendix B). For TN the I-94 carries the TN endorsement; foreign passport + I-94 with valid endorsement also serves as an I-9 List A document (A.8).

requirements.label: Form I-20 (Current, Certificate of Eligibility)
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the immigration case plus org-defined PII retention period (spec 12); encrypted bucket, signed URLs only.
requirements.notes: Adaptive-intake slot for an enrolled F-1 student (spec 7.3 category coverage). Capture SEVIS ID and program end date from the I-20 as intake fields.

requirements.label: Enrollment Verification (One Full Academic Year)
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the immigration case plus org-defined retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Evidence of one full academic year of enrollment before CPT begins (A.1, narrow exceptions apply).

requirements.label: Form I-20 with CPT Endorsement
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the immigration case plus org-defined PII retention period (spec 12); encrypted bucket, signed URLs only.
requirements.notes: DSO authorizes CPT on page 2 of the I-20; no USCIS filing and no EAD (A.1). Work authorization is employer- and date-specific per the endorsement. Track cumulative full-time CPT days: 12+ months full-time CPT eliminates OPT eligibility at that degree level.

requirements.label: CPT Employment Offer Letter
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the immigration case plus org-defined retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Offer letter supporting the DSO's CPT authorization; must show the employment is integral to the established curriculum (A.1).

requirements.label: Course Registration Proof (CPT Course/Practicum)
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the immigration case plus org-defined retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Registration in the course, required practicum, or cooperative-agreement credit that makes CPT integral to the curriculum (A.1).

requirements.label: Form I-765 Application for Employment Authorization
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the immigration case plus org-defined PII retention period (spec 12); encrypted bucket, signed URLs only.
requirements.notes: EAD application. OPT: USCIS must receive within 30 days of the DSO's SEVIS recommendation and within the 90-days-before to 60-days-after program-end window (A.2). STEM: file up to 90 days before OPT EAD expiry (A.3). I-485 track: filed concurrently for the (c)(9) EAD (A.7). Attorney prepares in GC filings.

requirements.label: Form I-20 with OPT Recommendation
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the immigration case plus org-defined PII retention period (spec 12); encrypted bucket, signed URLs only.
requirements.notes: Spec 7.3 F-1 OPT intake item: I-20 with OPT recommendation. Capture OPT start/end dates and SEVIS ID as intake fields from this document (7.3).

requirements.label: Passport-Style Photos
requirements.retention_note: Retain until filing is complete; org-defined retention thereafter (spec 12).
requirements.notes: USCIS-specification photos accompanying the I-765 filing.

requirements.label: USCIS Filing Fee Payment Evidence
requirements.retention_note: Retain with the case file per org-defined retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Fee payment for the I-765. Fee amounts are versioned rules data (uscis_fees.json), never hard-coded (spec 7.5, 14).

requirements.label: EAD Card (Form I-766)
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the immigration case plus org-defined PII retention period (spec 12); encrypted bucket, signed URLs only; access logged.
requirements.notes: Front and back. Spec 7.3 F-1 OPT intake item. Work may start only on the EAD start date with card in hand (A.2). EAD start triggers the unemployment clock and EAD expiry is a notification trigger (Appendix B). Also an I-9 List A document.

requirements.label: Form I-983 Training Plan
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the duration of STEM OPT plus org-defined retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Signed by both the student and the employer official; required for the STEM OPT extension (A.3). Material changes to the training plan must be reported within 10 days; validation reports due at 6/12/18/24 months.

requirements.label: Form I-20 with STEM OPT Recommendation
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the immigration case plus org-defined PII retention period (spec 12); encrypted bucket, signed URLs only.
requirements.notes: USCIS must receive the STEM I-765 within 60 days of this DSO recommendation (A.3). Capture SEVIS ID and STEM EAD dates as intake fields.

requirements.label: STEM Degree Diploma or Official Transcript
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the immigration case plus org-defined retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Must show a qualifying STEM CIP code on the DHS designated degree list (A.3).

requirements.label: Employer E-Verify Enrollment Evidence (Company ID)
requirements.retention_note: Retain as org compliance evidence per org-defined retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: STEM OPT requires an E-Verify employer in good standing (A.3); the E-Verify company ID goes on the I-983 and I-765.

requirements.label: H-1B Cap Registration Selection Notice
requirements.retention_note: Retain with the petition file per org-defined retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Selection in the cap lottery (65,000 regular + 20,000 US master's); wage-weighted selection effective Feb 27, 2026 requires SOC code and OEWS wage level at registration (A.5). Petition must be filed within the 90-day window after selection.

requirements.label: Form I-129 Petition for a Nonimmigrant Worker
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the immigration case plus org-defined PII retention period (spec 12); encrypted bucket, signed URLs only.
requirements.notes: H-1B petition (new cap, transfer/portability, extension incl. AC21 post-6th-year). Extension may be filed up to 6 months before expiry; the 240-day rule permits continued work while a timely extension is pending (A.6).

requirements.label: Certified Labor Condition Application (ETA-9035)
requirements.retention_note: Retain per DOL public-access-file obligations and org-defined retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Spec 7.3 H-1B intake item. DOL-certified LCA covering each worksite. For third-party placements the per-worksite LCA requirement of spec 7.6 applies (see per_worksite_lca).

requirements.label: Degree Evidence (Diploma, Transcripts, Evaluations)
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the immigration case plus org-defined retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Supports the specialty-occupation qualification (H-1B) and the I-140 education requirement. Include credential evaluations for foreign degrees.

requirements.label: OPT I-20 (Supporting the H-1B Change of Status)
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the immigration case plus org-defined PII retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Current OPT I-20 evidencing valid F-1 status at the time of the cap-subject change-of-status filing (A.4, A.5).

requirements.label: STEM OPT I-20 (Supporting the H-1B Change of Status)
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the immigration case plus org-defined PII retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Current STEM I-20 evidencing valid F-1 STEM OPT status at the time of the cap-subject change-of-status filing (A.4, A.5).

requirements.label: Form I-797C Notice of Action (Receipt Notice)
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the immigration case plus org-defined retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Receipt notice for any pending petition; capture the receipt number in case_transitions. Cap-gap I-9 proof = I-797C + cap-gap I-20 (A.4). Portability work authorization begins on receipt for H-1B transfers (A.6). Serves as the 7.3 'I-140 receipt' intake item for i140_pending; capture priority date and preference category as intake fields.

requirements.label: Cap-Gap I-20
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the immigration case plus org-defined PII retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: DSO-issued I-20 showing the cap-gap extension. With the I-797C receipt it documents I-9 work authorization during cap-gap, which now ends April 1 of the relevant fiscal year (A.4, rule effective Jan 17, 2025).

requirements.label: Form I-797 Approval Notice
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the immigration case plus org-defined retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Spec 7.3 H-1B intake item: I-797 approval notice. Capture validity dates as intake fields and load them into case_dates (H-1B validity expiry drives the 6-month extension-filing window notification, Appendix B). Also the approval artifact for decision transitions. Placeholder statuses l1/o1 reuse this slot per statuses.json evidence.

requirements.label: Form I-797 Prior Approval Notice (Current/Previous Employer)
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the immigration case plus org-defined retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Evidence the beneficiary was previously counted against the cap and holds/held valid H-1B status; supports portability filings (A.6).

requirements.label: Recent Paystubs
requirements.retention_note: Retain with the petition file per org-defined PII retention period (spec 12); encrypted bucket; access logged.
requirements.notes: Evidence of maintenance of status and current employment for transfer/extension filings (A.6). Contains compensation data; treat as sensitive.

requirements.label: Form I-129 Amended Petition
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the immigration case plus org-defined PII retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Amended petition for a material change (worksite outside the original metro area or significant role change); must be filed before or at the change (A.6). A placement worksite metro change must trigger this workflow automatically (7.6).

requirements.label: Certified LCA for New Worksite
requirements.retention_note: Retain per DOL public-access-file obligations and org-defined retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: New DOL-certified LCA covering the new worksite metro area, required before the amended petition is filed (7.6, A.6).

requirements.label: Prevailing Wage Determination (DOL)
requirements.retention_note: Retain with the PERM audit file per DOL requirements and org-defined retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: DOL prevailing wage determination obtained before PERM recruitment/filing (A.7).

requirements.label: PERM Recruitment Evidence
requirements.retention_note: Retain with the PERM audit file per DOL requirements and org-defined retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Advertisements, postings, recruitment report and applicant review records supporting the DOL-compliant recruitment completed before ETA-9089 filing (A.7). Needed if DOL audits or orders supervised recruitment.

requirements.label: Form ETA-9089 PERM Labor Certification (Filed Copy)
requirements.retention_note: Retain with the PERM audit file per DOL requirements and org-defined retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Spec 7.3 green-card intake item ('PERM receipts'): the filed ETA-9089 / DOL confirmation for anyone entering intake at perm_filed. The PERM filing date becomes the priority date (A.7); capture priority date and preference category as intake fields for priority_date_tracking.

requirements.label: Sponsored Position Job Description
requirements.retention_note: Retain with the PERM audit file per org-defined retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Job duties and minimum requirements for the sponsored PERM position; must match the prevailing wage determination and recruitment (A.7). Also baseline for later same-or-similar portability analysis (106(c)).

requirements.label: Certified ETA-9089 (Approved PERM)
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the green-card case plus org-defined retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: DOL-certified labor certification. Critical deadline: valid 180 days; the I-140 must be filed within that window (Appendix B: PERM validity 180-day trigger).

requirements.label: Form I-140 Immigrant Petition for Alien Worker
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the green-card case plus org-defined PII retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Spec 7.3 green-card intake covers 'PERM/I-140 receipts': the filed I-140 copy plus its I-797C receipt document the i140_pending status. Premium processing 15 business days (A.7). Capture priority date and preference category as intake fields.

requirements.label: Employer Ability-to-Pay Evidence
requirements.retention_note: Company-confidential financials; restrict to employer/attorney visibility; retain with the I-140 file per org-defined retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Annual reports, tax returns, or audited financials showing ability to pay the proffered wage from the priority date (A.7). Not employee PII but access-restricted company data.

requirements.label: Experience / Employment Verification Letters
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the green-card case plus org-defined retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Letters from prior employers evidencing the qualifying experience listed on the ETA-9089 (A.7).

requirements.label: Form I-485 Application to Adjust Status
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the green-card case plus org-defined PII retention period (spec 12); encrypted bucket; access logged.
requirements.notes: Adjustment application; filed copy + receipt document the i485_pending status. File within 1 year of the priority date becoming current to preserve AC21 H-1B extension eligibility (A.6 trap, Appendix B). Concurrent filing with I-140/I-765/I-131 permitted when the priority date is current (7.4).

requirements.label: Form I-131 Application for Travel Document (Advance Parole)
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the green-card case plus org-defined PII retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Advance parole application filed with (or during) the I-485; AP prevents abandonment on travel (A.7). Renew continuously during pendency (Appendix B: EAD/AP renewal trigger).

requirements.label: Form I-693 Report of Immigration Medical Examination
requirements.retention_note: Medical information: strictest access tier; encrypted; retain only as long as the case requires plus org-defined medical-record retention (spec 12); all access logged.
requirements.notes: Civil surgeon medical exam supporting the I-485. Sealed envelope; store scanned copy only if provided unsealed by the applicant.

requirements.label: Birth Certificate (with Certified Translation)
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the green-card case plus org-defined PII retention period (spec 12); encrypted bucket; access logged.
requirements.notes: Required civil document for the I-485; country of birth also drives priority-date/backlog logic on immigration_cases (6.3).

requirements.label: Form I-797 I-140 Approval Notice
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the green-card case plus org-defined retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Documents i140_approved status and anchors AC21 104(c) 3-year extensions, the one-year-to-file-I-485 clock, and 106(c) same-or-similar portability. I-140 must not be withdrawn within 180 days of approval to preserve benefits (A.6). Capture priority date and preference category for priority_date_tracking.

requirements.label: EAD Card, (c)(9) Category (Pending I-485)
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the green-card case plus org-defined PII retention period (spec 12); access logged.
requirements.notes: Spec 7.3 green-card intake: 'EAD if applicable'. Front and back. Optional because the employee may instead keep working on the maintained underlying status (e.g., H-1B). Renewal during pendency is a notification trigger (Appendix B).

requirements.label: Advance Parole Document (I-131 Approval / EAD-AP Combo Card)
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the green-card case plus org-defined PII retention period (spec 12); access logged.
requirements.notes: Spec 7.3 green-card intake: 'AP if applicable'. AP prevents abandonment of the I-485 on international travel; renewal is a notification trigger (Appendix B).

requirements.label: Form DS-260 Immigrant Visa Application (Confirmation)
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the green-card case plus org-defined PII retention period (spec 12); access logged.
requirements.notes: Online immigrant visa application submitted to the National Visa Center; confirmation page documents the consular_pending status (A.7).

requirements.label: NVC Fee Payment Receipts
requirements.retention_note: Retain with the case file per org-defined retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Immigrant visa application and affidavit-of-support fee receipts from the National Visa Center.

requirements.label: Civil Documents (Birth/Marriage/Divorce Certificates, Translations)
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the green-card case plus org-defined PII retention period (spec 12); access logged.
requirements.notes: NVC civil-document package with certified translations for the consular immigrant-visa case (A.7).

requirements.label: Police Certificates
requirements.retention_note: Strict access tier; retain only as long as the case requires plus org-defined retention (spec 12); all access logged.
requirements.notes: Police clearance certificates from countries of residence, required for consular processing.

requirements.label: Panel Physician Medical Examination
requirements.retention_note: Medical information: strictest access tier; encrypted; retain only as long as the case requires (spec 12); all access logged.
requirements.notes: Medical exam by an authorized panel physician ahead of the consular interview (consular counterpart of the I-693).

requirements.label: Immigrant Visa (Issued at Consulate)
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the case plus org-defined PII retention period (spec 12); access logged.
requirements.notes: Immigrant visa foil issued after the consular interview; validity is limited and the beneficiary must be admitted to the US before it expires (Appendix B: immigrant visa expiry tracked on the transition).

requirements.label: Passport Admission Stamp (I-551 Temporary Evidence)
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the case plus org-defined PII retention period (spec 12); access logged.
requirements.notes: Admission stamp endorsing the immigrant visa serves as temporary I-551 evidence of permanent residence until the physical green card arrives.

requirements.label: Permanent Resident Card (Form I-551)
requirements.retention_note: Retain per org-defined PII retention period (spec 12); encrypted bucket; access logged.
requirements.notes: Front and back. Intake evidence for permanent_resident status (statuses.json evidence: permanent_resident_card_i551) and terminal artifact of both green-card paths. Also an I-9 List A document; card expiry tracked for awareness only (no reverification of LPRs).

requirements.label: Form I-485 Supplement J (Job Portability)
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the green-card case plus org-defined PII retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Confirms the new job offer is in the same or a similar occupational classification for AC21 106(c) portability once the I-485 has been pending 180+ days with an approved I-140 (7.4, A.7).

requirements.label: New Job Offer Letter (Same-or-Similar Position)
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the life of the green-card case plus org-defined retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Offer letter for the new same-or-similar position supporting Supplement J; attorney assesses the same-or-similar classification (legal judgment routes to counsel per spec 14).

requirements.label: Offboarding Checklist (Completed)
requirements.retention_note: Retain per org-defined HR record retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Section 8 offboarding artifact recording the last day of employment; starts the immigration grace-period clock (H-1B 60-day grace) or unemployment-day accrual (OPT 90 / STEM 150) and notifies HR and counsel.

requirements.label: H-1B Petition Withdrawal Letter to USCIS
requirements.retention_note: Retain per org-defined compliance retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Employer's notification to USCIS withdrawing the H-1B petition after termination; part of the offboarding grace-period workflow (8, 7.4).

requirements.label: LCA Withdrawal Confirmation (DOL)
requirements.retention_note: Retain per DOL public-access-file obligations and org-defined retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Confirmation that the certified LCA was withdrawn after the H-1B employment ended; limits back-wage exposure (offboarding workflow, section 8).

requirements.label: Return Transportation Offer Evidence
requirements.retention_note: Retain per org-defined compliance retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Evidence the employer offered the reasonable cost of return transportation abroad to the H-1B worker dismissed before the end of the authorized period (offboarding workflow, section 8).

requirements.label: SEVIS/SEVP Portal Employer Update Confirmation
requirements.retention_note: Retain per org-defined compliance retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Confirmation that the OPT/STEM employment change was reported in SEVIS/SEVP Portal; missed reports risk SEVIS failure-to-report termination (A.3, 7.4). Unemployment-day accrual continues until new qualifying employment is reported.

requirements.label: Employer Departure Report to SEVP (5-Day Rule)
requirements.retention_note: Retain per org-defined compliance retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: STEM OPT employers must report the employee's departure within 5 days (A.3); material changes within 10 days. Deadline tracked by the notification engine (employer_departure_report_5_day_deadline).

requirements.label: Client / End-Client Letter
requirements.retention_note: Keep current for the life of the placement; retain superseded versions for site-visit defense per org-defined retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Spec 7.6 third-party placement compliance set. Required per placement when employment_type=placement: letter from the client/end-client confirming the role, duties, worksite, and duration. Must be kept current because USCIS conducts site visits at third-party client locations, remote worksites, and home offices.

requirements.label: Statement of Work / Work Order
requirements.retention_note: Keep current for the life of the placement; retain superseded versions for site-visit defense per org-defined retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Spec 7.6 third-party placement compliance set. Required per placement when employment_type=placement: the SOW/work order (including any vendor/prime layer) evidencing the contractual chain and the employer-employee relationship.

requirements.label: Per-Worksite Certified LCA
requirements.retention_note: Keep current per worksite for the life of the placement; retain per DOL public-access-file obligations (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Spec 7.6 third-party placement compliance set. Required per placement when employment_type=placement: a certified LCA covering each placement worksite (referenced from the placements table). A worksite change to a new metro area triggers the amended-petition workflow (h1b_active__h1b_amendment_pending) with certified_lca_new_worksite.

requirements.label: Itinerary of Services
requirements.retention_note: Keep current for the life of the placement; retain superseded versions for site-visit defense per org-defined retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Spec 7.6 third-party placement compliance set. Required per placement when employment_type=placement: itinerary of dates and locations of services when work occurs at multiple worksites.

requirements.label: Offer Letter (Generated and E-Signed)
requirements.retention_note: Retain for the duration of employment plus org-defined post-termination HR retention period (spec 12).
requirements.notes: Section 8 HR onboarding document for every new hire regardless of immigration status. Generated from a template with variables using the docx/pdf skills, routed for e-signature, and tracked in offer_letters (template, variables, generated file, e-signature status per 6.5).

requirements.label: Form W-4 Employee's Withholding Certificate
requirements.retention_note: Contains SSN: encrypt at the application layer in addition to at-rest encryption (spec 6.5, 8, 12); all access logged; retention period per org PII policy pending counsel (IRS employment-tax practice is at least 4 years).
requirements.notes: Section 8 HR onboarding document collected for every new hire. W-4 data is stored encrypted in w4_records (6.5); access is need-to-know per the access matrix (3.3).

requirements.label: Form I-9 Employment Eligibility Verification (Completed)
requirements.retention_note: Statutory: retain 3 years after hire or 1 year after termination, whichever is later (A.8, spec 8, 12); encrypted bucket; all access logged.
requirements.notes: Section 1 completed by the employee by the first day of work (not before offer acceptance); Section 2 completed within 3 business days of start; both sections by day one if employment is under 3 days (A.8). Section 1/Section 2 timestamps, list A/B/C doc references, E-Verify case id, and alternative-procedure flag live in i9_records (6.5). Current edition 01/20/2025 (expiration 05/31/2027). Employees on cap-gap document work authorization with the I-797C receipt + cap-gap I-20 (A.4).

requirements.label: I-9 List A Document (Identity + Employment Authorization)
requirements.retention_note: Copies retained follow the I-9 retention rule: 3 years after hire or 1 year after termination, whichever is later (A.8); encrypted; access logged.
requirements.notes: Conditionally required: the employee presents EITHER one List A document OR one List B plus one List C document; the employer may not demand specific documents (anti-discrimination, A.8). All documents must be unexpired. Examples: US passport; Permanent Resident Card (I-551); EAD card (I-766); foreign passport + I-94 with valid endorsement. Referenced from i9_records list A/B/C doc references (6.5).

requirements.label: I-9 List B Document (Identity)
requirements.retention_note: Copies retained follow the I-9 retention rule: 3 years after hire or 1 year after termination, whichever is later (A.8); encrypted; access logged.
requirements.notes: Conditionally required: presented together with one List C document when no List A document is used (A.8). Must be unexpired; employer may not demand specific documents. Examples: state driver's license or ID card.

requirements.label: I-9 List C Document (Employment Authorization)
requirements.retention_note: Copies retained follow the I-9 retention rule: 3 years after hire or 1 year after termination, whichever is later (A.8); encrypted; access logged.
requirements.notes: Conditionally required: presented together with one List B document when no List A document is used (A.8). Must be unexpired. Examples: unrestricted Social Security card; US birth certificate. SSN data is sensitive PII (spec 12).

requirements.label: I-9 Receipt for Replacement Document (90-Day Rule)
requirements.retention_note: Retain with the I-9 file under the statutory I-9 retention rule (A.8); encrypted; access logged.
requirements.notes: Optional slot used only when a lost/stolen/damaged document receipt is presented: the actual replacement document must be presented within 90 days (A.8 receipt rule). The 90-day deadline should be tracked by the notification engine.

requirements.label: I-9 Alternative Procedure Document Copies (Front and Back)
requirements.retention_note: Mandatory retention of front/back copies when the alternative procedure is used, under the statutory I-9 retention rule (A.8, spec 8); encrypted; access logged.
requirements.notes: Used only when I-9 Section 2 is completed via the remote alternative procedure: available solely to E-Verify employers in good standing; requires live video review, retention of front/back copies of the documents examined, and checking the alternative-procedure box on the I-9 (A.8). Sets the alternative-procedure flag in i9_records (6.5).

requirements.label: E-Verify Case Confirmation
requirements.retention_note: Retain with the I-9 file under the statutory I-9 retention rule (A.8); encrypted; access logged.
requirements.notes: E-Verify case must be created within 3 business days of hire (A.8; Appendix B tracks the E-Verify 3-business-day deadline). The E-Verify case id is stored in i9_records (6.5). The firm operates as an E-Verify employer, which is also a precondition for STEM OPT sponsorship (A.3).
